SEARCH
Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories

Class MovieRepository

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.repositories.MovieRepository
public class MovieRepository extends Object
Static in-memory repository that holds all Movie screening records loaded from MOVIES.csv at application startup. Uses a LinkedHashMap keyed by movie ID to preserve insertion order and support constant-time lookups. Any additions, edits, or deletions made during the session are persisted to disk on logout or exit via MovieCsvIO.

  • Constructor Details

    • MovieRepository

      public MovieRepository()

  • Method Details

    • getMovies

      public static LinkedHashMap<String,Movie> getMovies()
      Returns the entire in-memory movie map.
      Returns:
      a LinkedHashMap mapping movie ID → Movie for all current screening records

    • setMovies

      public static void setMovies(LinkedHashMap<String,Movie> movies)
      Replaces the current in-memory movie store with the given map. Called on application startup after reading all records from MOVIES.csv.
      Parameters:
      movies - the LinkedHashMap of movie ID → Movie to set as the active movie store

    • addMovie

      public static Movie addMovie(String title, String genre, int duration, String rating, String showTime, String occupiedSeat, int seatPrice) throws IOException
      Creates a new Movie from the supplied parameters, stores it in the in-memory repository, immediately appends it to MOVIES.csv via MovieCsvIO.writeMovieData(String), and returns the created instance. The movie ID is automatically generated as a UUID.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the movie
      genre - the genre of the movie
      duration - the runtime of the movie in minutes
      rating - the age rating of the movie (e.g. "PG-13")
      showTime - the showtime string in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format
      occupiedSeat - a comma-separated string of already-booked seat IDs, or an empty string if no seats are booked
      seatPrice - the price in dollars per seat for this screening
      Returns:
      the newly created and stored Movie instance
      Throws:
      IOException - if the new movie record cannot be appended to the CSV file

    • editMovie

      public static void editMovie(String id, Movie edited)
      Replaces the movie record associated with the given ID with the supplied edited Movie object. The existing entry in the map is overwritten in place, preserving the movie's position in insertion order.
      Parameters:
      id - the movie ID of the record to update
      edited - the updated Movie object to store

    • deleteMovie

      public static void deleteMovie(String id)
      Removes the movie record associated with the given ID from the in-memory repository. The deletion is reflected in MOVIES.csv on the next full save triggered by logout or exit.
      Parameters:
      id - the movie ID of the record to delete

    • searchMovie

      public static ArrayList<Movie> searchMovie(String information)
      Searches the in-memory movie store for records matching the given information string. If the string exactly matches a movie ID, that single movie is returned. Otherwise, all movies whose title, genre, duration, rating, showtime string, or seat price match the query are returned.
      Parameters:
      information - the search query; may be a movie ID, title, genre, duration in minutes, age rating, showtime in yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm format, or seat price value
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of Movie objects matching the search query; empty if no matches are found
